element_introduction_order.mastery_context: core mechanic—dragging and dropping items, opening containers (gumps), inventory management becomes essential immediately

element_introduction_order.element: Real-time combat with AI party control
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: player learns to set AI behavior profiles (aggressive, defensive, ranged) and manage up to 8 party members; can pause via menu/inventory to reduce cognitive load
keywords only appear after plot triggers; player learns conversational gates prevent premature knowledge discovery
player discovers some locations require item stacking to create stairs; spatial manipulation becomes puzzle mechanic
world depth increases; objects stack, floors separate, inaccessible areas become traversable via environmental manipulation

element_introduction_order.element: Crafting and world manipulation (baking, forging, musical instruments)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: emergent gameplay—virtuality of interaction (virtually everything moveable/interactive) enables self-directed exploration and roleplay
Avatar faces moral traps and disguised threats; cleansing Britannia requires discernment

typical_relief_triggers: pausing via inventory/menu during real-time combat
safe dialogue tree interactions with NPCs
optional crafting and world manipulation activities
typical_tension_triggers: deceptions and hidden plots requiring player discernment
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Real-time action punctuated by player-controlled pauses; mouse-driven interactivity encourages exploration and reduces friction, creating breathing room between combat encounters; dialogue trees gate information revelation, controlling narrative tension

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Stacking mechanics and multi-layered world allow hidden/inaccessible areas that become passable via environmental manipulation; vertical depth signals optional challenge areas
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Objects in world can be arranged to create traversal opportunities; interactive density (virtually everything moveable) implies exploration rewards

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction to mouse-driven mechanics and basic real-time combat; dialogue trees prevent premature triggers; low-pressure exploration phase
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Environmental puzzles introduced (stacking mechanics); multi-layered navigation opens; plot-driven moral challenges and deceptions increase tension
difficulty_curve.late_game: Full-world traversal required; complex puzzle chains; multiple disguised threats and crown authority undermining; mastery of all systems demanded
notable_spikes: First real-time combat encounter (transition from pause-friendly exploration)
Introduction of vertical stacking puzzles (spatial reasoning required)
Major plot deceptions revealing hidden antagonist schemes

notable_level_patterns.description: World design rewards thorough interaction with objects; dragging and dropping, container opening, and environmental manipulation are rewarded frequently; encourages emergent problem-solving
Dialogue trees and NPC interactions require player judgment; keyword-gating prevents accidental triggering; deceptions and disguises demand active player attention
Combat sections punctuate exploration; AI party management reduces micromanagement burden; player can pause via UI to reduce cognitive overload during intense moments
Multi-layered world introduces stacking as a core puzzle mechanic; some areas inaccessible until player learns to manipulate environment vertically; spatial reasoning becomes level gate
